Video.summary: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.
Video.title: Anger Management

Video.summary: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.
Video.title: Bad Dogs of Comedy

Video.summary: Cesar helps dogs overcome their fears including a whippet mix who is blind and deaf, a labradoodle that fears the ocean, and a cocker spaniel that fears all humans.
Video.title: Fear Factor

Video.summary: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chihuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.
Video.title: Playboy Playmates

Video.summary: A follow-up on the Hurricane Katrina dogs Cesar took; a German shepherd mix is difficult to walk; a chocolate lab refuses to walk on her family's new hardwood floors.
Video.title: Hurricane Hounds (Part 2)

Video.summary: Actress Denise Richards needs help getting in control of her three dogs; a miniature pinscher bites visitors; a lazy basset hound.
Video.title: Wild Things

Video.summary: A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.
Video.title: Devil Dog

Video.summary: Rottweilers with behavior problems; a small mixed-breed fails two obedience classes; a vizsla needs help adjusting to a move from the country to the city.
Video.title: Naughty Rotties

Video.summary: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.
Video.title: Doggie Jekyll & Hyde

Video.summary: An Alaskan malamute exhibits aggressive tendencies; Cesar helps a professional dog walker with her clients.
Video.title: Dark Shadow

Video.summary: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.
Video.title: The Escape Artist

Video.summary: A lab-beagle mix needs help to be socialized; a woman worries about the aggressive behavior of her new husband's dog; a Shar-Pei behaves aggressively toward the TV.
Video.title: Expecting Trouble

Video.summary: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.
Video.title: Fear of Dogs

Video.summary: A woman's aggressive dogs are coming in between her and her husband; a German Shepherd who failed obedience school; a Sheltie barks in the car and bites other dogs.
Video.title: Spike in the Heart

Video.summary: A Doberman mix instigates fights at the dog park; a Pomeranian charges other dogs; an aggressive terrier mix.
Video.title: The Evil Queen

Video.summary: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.
Video.title: Whipped & Wild

Video.summary: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.
Video.title: Fear the Trash Can

Video.summary: A dog develops an aggression problem after moving to a new area; a big dog does not let people near her owner; a beagle sniffs continually.
Video.title: Boogie-Boarding Beagle

Video.summary: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.
Video.title: Collie Crisis

Video.summary: Cesar helps the owner of a grooming business deal with difficult canine clients; a Chihuahua has a barking problem.
Video.title: Bad Hair Day

Video.summary: Pets abandoned during Hurricane Katrina reunite with their owners or find new homes; a pit bull behaves aggressively toward the dog of his owner's new girlfriend; a large dog has pica.
Video.title: Hurricane Hounds (Part 1)

Video.summary: A pit bull is aggressive toward strangers; a Rottweiler/Shar-Pei mix must get his aggression under control or be euthanized.
Video.title: Rescue Rufus!

Video.summary: A Maltese tries to bite and attack people; a spoiled Pomeranian; a Rottweiler vents his aggression on shopping carts.
Video.title: LA Laker Meltdown

Video.summary: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.
Video.title: Blind Rage
